instruction: You are a food blogger (User ID: customer_010). There are three dishes in front of you. Regarding the Raw Salmon dish, ask the AI Service Agent to check whether it is included in the Steak Lovers Set. If this dish is included in the set, ask the AI Service Agent to look for an item in the "Selected Steaks" category that is [High Protein] and has the [Highest Price], and add it to the order. If there are multiple items tied for the highest price among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Otherwise, ask the AI Service Agent to look for an item in the category containing Panini that is [Mild] and has the [Lowest Sodium], and add it to the order. If there are multiple items tied for the lowest sodium content among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Finally, ask the AI Service Agent to calculate the total grams of carbohydrates for all dishes in the order.

diff.notes: Manual visual entity grounding and DB/tool-condition review support the official GT.

instruction: You are a nutritionist (User ID: customer_009). There are three dishes in front of you. Regarding the Raw Salmon dish, ask the AI Service Agent to check its sodium content. Ask the AI Service Agent to determine: if the sodium content of this dish is higher than 800mg, then ask the AI Service Agent to filter within the "Salad" category for dishes that are [Dairy-Free] and have the [Lowest Price], replace the current dish with them, and add them to the order. If there are multiple dishes tied for the lowest price among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Otherwise, ask the AI Service Agent to search within the category containing Melon and Ham dishes, find items that are [High Carb] and have the [Lowest Calorie], and add them to the order. If there are multiple dishes tied for the lowest calorie count among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Finally, ask the AI Service Agent to calculate the total payable amount for the current order after discounts.

diff.notes: Manual visual entity grounding and DB/tool-condition review support the official GT.

instruction:
Results:
You are a fitness coach (User ID: customer_007). There are three dishes in front of you. Regarding the raw salmon dish, ask the AI service agent to retrieve its nutrition information. Ask the AI service agent to determine: if the fat content of this dish exceeds 10 grams, then ask the AI service agent to find a [High Protein] and [Lowest Price] dish in the "Cold Cuts" category and add it to the order. If there are multiple items tied for the lowest price among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Otherwise, ask the AI service agent to find a [Low Fat] and [Biggest Discount] dish in the "Appetizers & Snacks" category and add it to the order. If there are multiple items tied for the biggest discount among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Subsequently, ask the AI service agent to determine: if the total calories in the current order exceed 800 kcal, then remove the highest calorie non-set meal item from the order. Finally, ask the AI service agent to calculate the total tax for the current order.

diff.notes: Manual visual entity grounding and DB/tool-condition review support the official GT.

instruction: You are a parent (User ID: customer_003). There are three dishes in front of you. Regarding the raw salmon dish, ask the AI Service Agent to check if it contains gluten. If this dish contains gluten, ask the AI Service Agent to find an item in the "Salad" category that is high in calcium and has the lowest price, and add it to the order. If there are multiple items tied for the lowest price among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Otherwise, ask the AI Service Agent to find an item in the Sandwiches category that is low in fat and has the lowest sugar content, and add it to the order. If there are multiple items tied for the lowest sugar content among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Finally, ask the AI Service Agent to calculate the total amount payable for your order after discount.

diff.notes: Manual visual entity grounding and DB/tool-condition review support the official GT.

instruction: You are a nutritionist (User ID: customer_002). There are three dishes in front of you. Focus on the Panini dish. You need to ask the AI service agent to check its protein content. Ask the AI service agent to determine: if the protein content is less than 25 grams, ask the AI service agent to find an item in the "Handmade Bread" category that is [Nut-free] and has the [Highest Protein], and add it to the order. If there are multiple items tied for the highest protein content among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Otherwise, ask the AI service agent to find an item in the "Appetizers and Snacks" category that is [High Fiber] and has the [Lowest Sodium Content], and add it to the order. If there are multiple items tied for the lowest sodium content among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Next, ask the AI service agent to determine: if the total tax on the order is greater than 15 yuan, then remove the lowest-priced non-set meal item from the order. Finally, ask the AI service agent to calculate the total calories of your order.

diff.notes: Official GT has a user_id typo (`ustomer_002`) in add_dish_to_order; instruction and DB otherwise support the same action sequence.

instruction: You are a frugal diner (User ID: customer_008). There are three dishes in front of you. Regarding the raw salmon dish, ask the AI Service Agent to query its price. Instruct the AI Service Agent to judge: if the unit price of this dish exceeds 50 yuan, ask the AI Service Agent to find items in the "Sandwich" category that are [Low Fat] and have the [Highest Protein], and add them to the order. If there are multiple items tied for the highest protein among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Otherwise, ask the AI Service Agent to find items in the "Cold Cut" category that are [High Sodium] (high_sodium) and have the [Lowest Price], and add them to the order. If there are multiple items tied for the lowest price among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Finally, ask the AI Service Agent to calculate the total dietary fiber content of the current order.

diff.notes: Manual visual entity grounding and DB/tool-condition review support the official GT.

instruction: You are a picky customer (User ID: customer_006). There are three dishes in front of you. Regarding the raw salmon dish, ask the AI Service Agent to check its allergen information. Ask the AI Service Agent to determine: if this dish contains dairy, then ask the AI Service Agent to find a dish in the same category as Panini that is [salty/umami flavored] and has the [lowest calories], and add it to the order. If there are multiple dishes tied for the lowest calories among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Otherwise, ask the AI Service Agent to find a dish in "Annie Signature Dishes" that is [gluten-free] and has the [highest price], and add it to the order. If there are multiple dishes tied for the highest price among those that meet the conditions, you want all of them to be added. Afterwards, ask the AI Service Agent to determine if the total cost of non-set items in the order exceeds 300 yuan. If so, remove the most expensive non-set item from the order. Finally, ask the AI Service Agent to calculate the total tax for your order.

diff.notes: Instruction asks to calculate total tax, but official GT calls compute_total_payment. The visual/DB branch and added dish are otherwise supported.

instruction: You are a food critic (User ID: customer_001). There are three dishes in front of you. instruction: You are a health-conscious fitness enthusiast (User ID: customer_003). There are three dishes in front of you. instruction: You are a data-driven budgeter (User ID: customer_001). There are three dishes in front of you. For the Smoked Salmon dish, ask the AI Service Agent to check its discount factor. Ask the AI Service Agent to determine: if the discount factor for this dish is lower than 0.9, then ask the AI Service Agent to search the "Dessert" section for an item that is [Low Sugar] and has the [Lowest Price], and add it to the order. Subsequently, ask the AI Service Agent to determine: if the total original price of non-set meal items in the current order exceeds 150 yuan, then remove the non-set meal item with the smallest discount magnitude. Finally, ask the AI Service Agent to calculate the total amount payable after discounts.

parameters.dish_name: Orecchiette with Italian sausage, burrata cheese

dishes.dish_name: Orecchiette with Italian sausage, burrata cheese

diff.notes: Salmone affumicato discount is 0.8, so the true branch is entered, but DB has no low-sugar Dessert item. Official GT instead adds a Pasta item and removes Margherita, which is not supported by the instruction branch.

instruction: You are a food photographer (User ID: customer_002). There are three dishes in front of you. For the Smoked Salmon dish, ask the AI Service Agent to query its allergens. Ask the AI Service Agent to determine if this dish contains nut allergens. If it does, ask the AI Service Agent to search in the category containing the Melon and Ham dish for a [Vegan] item with the [Highest Protein] and add it to the order. If multiple items tie for the highest protein among those meeting the conditions, add all of them. Otherwise, ask the AI Service Agent to search in the "Dessert" category for a [Gluten-Free] item with the [Largest Discount] and add it to the order.
